meta.description: Arena venues across the Undercity dome
meta.notes: Each venue has its own flavor, event types, and regular schedule

venues.name: Arena of Ascendance
venues.description: The premier combat arena. Three tiers of seating surrounding a sand pit. Argent Blades territory.

flavor.atmosphere: Roaring crowds, torch smoke, iron and blood
flavor.signature: The crowd chants fighter names in unison before kills

sub_venues.name: The Dust Ring
sub_venues.notes: Open-air annex at Guild Spires East, training bouts

venues.name: The Night Pits
venues.description: Illegal underground fighting ring. No rules, no records. Lotus takes a cut.

flavor.atmosphere: Cramped, smoke-filled, bets called in whispers
flavor.signature: Fighters enter through a meat locker. Losers sometimes leave the same way.

venues.name: Grand Forum Exhibition Stage
venues.description: Civilized exhibition matches. Magical duels, demonstration bouts, sanctioned displays.

flavor.atmosphere: Marble columns, elevated seating, scholarly murmurs
flavor.signature: Duels must be declared three days in advance. Killing is forbidden.

venues.name: The Iron Maw Racing Tracks
venues.description: Beast racing, construct racing, and courier sprints. Heavy betting. Consortium territory.

flavor.atmosphere: Sawdust and oil, shouting bookies, mechanical roars
flavor.announcer: Rotates between Consortium announcers, all paid to hype
flavor.signature: The 'Maw Lap' — final stretch where anything goes

venues.name: Korvax's Beast Dome
venues.description: Exotic creature exhibitions, beast fights, taming demonstrations. Run by Korvax the Beastmaster.

flavor.atmosphere: Animal musk, exotic screeches, gasps of wonder and fear
flavor.announcer: Korvax narrates personally, knows every creature by name
flavor.signature: Audience members can bid to participate in taming challenges

venues.name: The Sanctum Trials
venues.description: Divine contract duels. Kharma-staked competitions. Faith vs faith.

flavor.atmosphere: Incense, chanting, the weight of divine attention
flavor.announcer: A rotating panel of Choir officials who speak in liturgical cadence
flavor.signature: Both combatants sign divine contracts. The gods watch. Literally.

venues.name: The Ash Ring
venues.description: Warden training ground opened for public viewing. Defensive demonstrations, siege drills.

flavor.atmosphere: Stone dust, drill commands, disciplined silence from Warden sections
flavor.announcer: Lieutenant Varen when she has time, otherwise a rotating sergeant
flavor.signature: Civilians bet on recruits. Wardens pretend not to notice.

venues.name: The Floating Ring
venues.description: A barge-mounted fighting platform on the canal. Moves between districts. Water hazards included.

flavor.atmosphere: Rocking platform, splashing, crowd on both banks
flavor.announcer: Whoever owns the barge that week
flavor.signature: Ring-outs count. Fighters can be knocked into the canal.

venues.name: The Scrapworks Pit
venues.description: Improvised arena in the salvage yards. Robot fights, junk gladiators, scrap construct battles.

flavor.atmosphere: Welding sparks, grinding metal, cheers from the scrap piles
flavor.announcer: Mara the Scrapper when she's not busy, otherwise her second
flavor.signature: Fighters can salvage parts from defeated constructs mid-match

venues.name: The Tower Colosseum
venues.description: Official FTA-sanctioned events. Adventurer rankings, tier challenges, official title bouts.

flavor.atmosphere: FTA banners, recording crystals, bureaucratic precision
flavor.announcer: Official FTA commentators, sterile but accurate
flavor.signature: All results are recorded. LP gains are calculated publicly.

event_type_descriptions.ranked_bout: Official ladder match affecting fighter rankings
event_type_descriptions.title_bout: Championship fight for venue or overall title
event_type_descriptions.beast_fight: Creatures vs creatures or creature vs humanoid
event_type_descriptions.contract_trial: Competition to fulfill a Serpent Choir contract
event_type_descriptions.kharma_bout: Fight where winner gains loser's staked Kharma
event_type_descriptions.wall_games: Athletic games celebrating the Outer Wall
event_type_descriptions.barge_brawl: Multi-fighter melee on the Floating Ring
event_type_descriptions.salvage_race: Find and retrieve items from scrap
event_type_descriptions.adventurer_showcase: Display of adventurer skills for public
event_type_descriptions.death_match: Fight to the death (illegal, Night Pits only)
event_type_descriptions.cage_match: Enclosed space, no escape until one falls

Magister Vorn.description: Booming voice, theatrical presence, knows every fighter's record

Korvax the Beastmaster.description: Scarred, missing an eye (beast incident), treats creatures like children

Sable.description: Lotus boss, rarely speaks, her presence means the fight matters

Mara the Scrapper.description: Saints-adjacent, runs the yard, loves a good construct fight
